vision_profile.current_state: Rohan is a final year B.Tech (CSE) student with theoretical AI knowledge but lacks practical application and industry-specific skills.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest obstacle is the lack of practical project experience and confidence in applying AI concepts to real-world problems.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated to secure an entry-level AI developer role to meet family expectations and start earning soon after graduation.

milestones.label: P1
milestones.identity_statement: Build a strong practical base in Python and essential tools to confidently tackle AI challenges.
milestones.market_value_display: Fresher — not yet earning from this skill
